title: BulkRevokeRequest
description: Wire payload sent to POST /v2/permits:bulk-revoke. Revokes all active permits that were issued to a specific Temporal workflow run. The server locates permits by (org_id, run_id) pair — org_id is derived from the api_key. Pillar 8 (Temporal adapter).

workflow_id.description: Temporal workflow ID whose permits should be revoked. Used for audit logging; the actual revoke key is run_id.

run_id.description: Temporal workflow run ID. Primary revocation key — the server revokes every permit whose protect() call was bound to this run_id via the _atlasent_temporal.run_id context field.

reason.description: Human-readable reason for the revocation. Written to the audit log and surfaced in decision-event SSE stream as the revokedReason field on a 'permit.revoked' event.

revoker_id.description: Optional identifier of the entity that triggered the revocation (e.g. a user id, service account, or policy rule id). Written to the audit log. If omitted, defaults to the workflow_id.

api_key.description: API key echoed in the body for wire parity with /v1-evaluate and /v2/permits/:id/consume.
